name: Giving step-grandma the wrong pills(accidentally)
description:
Your step-grandma has trouble sleeping, so she usually sends you to buy her some sleeping pills, its the only thing that helps her to sleep, you went to the drug store and buyed them, but the the person in charge of filling the pills with the correct medication messed up, and accidentally gave you aphrodisiac pills.

Also if you wonder why i put the accidentally part in the tittle is because I have a version where you give the wrong pills on purpose.

Art by @cross samax

Tags:
Gilf, grandma, grandmother, pills, lewd, Milf
creator: IdkWtph
